mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM m_operation_technology where process_codes in
#{codes}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO m_operation_technology (id, PROCESS_CODES, PROCESS_NAME, TECHNIQUE_NAME, technique_code, cargo_codes, cargo_names, create_by, create_time, STATUS) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{processCodes,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{processName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{techniqueName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{techniqueCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoCodes,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{cargoNames,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER})
mapper.update:
UPDATE m_operation_technology SET process_codes=#{processCodes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, process_name=#{processName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, technique_name=#{techniqueName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, technique_code=#{techniqueCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cargo_codes=#{cargoCodes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cargo_names=#{cargoNames,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY=#{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_TIME=#{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, STATUS=#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}
id=#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT t.id, t.process_codes, t.process_name, t.technique_name, t.technique_code, t.cargo_codes, t.cargo_names, t.status, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, s.user_name as create_by_name, a.user_name as update_by_name FROM m_operation_technology t inner join sys_user s on t.create_by = s.id left join sys_user a on t.update_by = a.id
and t.id=#{id}

select t.id, t.technology_id, t.machine_type_code, t.machine_model_code, t.num, b.model_name as machineModelName from m_operation_technology_machine t left join b_machine_type_model b on t.machine_model_code = b.model_code
technology_id=#{id}

select id, worker_post, worker_post_name, num, technology_id from m_operation_technology_worker where 1=1
and technology_id=#{id}

select t.id, t.type_code, t.model_code, t.num, t.technology_id, b.model_name as model_name from m_operation_technology_workwar t left join b_warkware_type_model b on t.model_code = b.model_code where 1=1
and technology_id=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO m_operation_technology_machine (id, technology_id, machine_type_code, machine_model_code, num) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{technologyId,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{machineTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{machineModelCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{num,jdbcType=INTEGER})

INSERT INTO m_operation_technology_worker (id, technology_id, worker_post, worker_post_name, num) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{technologyId,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{workerPost,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workerPostName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{num,jdbcType=INTEGER})

INSERT INTO m_operation_technology_workwar (id, technology_id, type_code, model_code, num) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{technologyId,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{typeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{num,jdbcType=INTEGER})
